title: fragaria alpina
intro: Fragaria alpina, also known as the alpine strawberry, is a type of wild strawberry native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, inflammation, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Fragaria alpina include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
